html:
RECOUP Integrative, Root-Cause Immune Health Program

Are you paying the cost of poor health from dysfunctional immune responses and uncontrolled inflammation?

The invisible epidemic of the 21st century: We all are constantly exposed to:

  • a.Over 34 classes of allergens.
  • b.Reducing diversity and volume of the microbiome.
  • c.Various mediators of immune and inflammatory reactions within us.
  • d.Surprisingly, getting triggered by everyday experiences like stress, cosmetics, sounds, smells, salt intake or sugar imbalance, whether diabetic or not.

Annually, an estimated 18% of the population is experiencing adverse effects from immune and inflammatory disorders.

Symptoms often appear when an underlying condition has developed for months or even years. Piecemeal care without an entire person approach fails to yield the desired health outcomes from optimised immune and inflammation control systems within us. You may not receive adequate attention from your usual healthcare provider and may unnecessarily spend a lot of money on excessive tests, medicines and interventions. Also, the limitations from poor health due to immune disorders and diseases cost people their work, family life, and recreational excursions. The inclusive monetary worth of loss and lost opportunities could be lakhs of rupees annually per person.

Persisting with conventional thinking sans adoption of updated and proven medical care has serious limitations:

  1. It is impractical to avoid foods for life, primarily when the patterns of developing intolerance during our lifetime are known.
  2. Rising dependence on Polypharmacy and its adverse side effects: steroids, NSAIDs, cytotoxic medicines, immunosuppressants, monoclonal antibodies. Inappropriate excess use is limited in managing the manifested severity but does not resolve the underlying harm that accumulates constantly.
  3. Vaccines are not completely protective against harm from viruses, bacteria, and allergens.
  4. Despite best efforts, rising severity, poor response to treatment and growing incidence of multiple allergies, autoimmune diseases, cancers and degenerative diseases.
  5. We need to change antigenicity from harmful agents and match the protective function of our internal capacities to defend such agents from harming us.
  6. Persisting consequences of long COVID syndrome where fatigue, headache, and reduced cardiac and muscular endurance, affecting many without proper care.
  7. Ailments that are rising in incidence early in life and recurring/persisting for long include irritable bowels, seasonal flu, skin rash, vulnerability to foods that were easy to digest earlier, migraine, loss of senses (smell, taste), vertigo, memory lapses, hypothyroidism, inflammatory obesity, arthritis, functional decline of mental functions, and dementia.

Take charge, now! Get assessed for your immune state and inflammatory conditions, and always take charge of your well-being:

  1. Detect adverse patterns of your immune and inflammatory control systems.
  2. Get evaluated for all known exposures, risks, harm, hazards, and stressors that may adversely affect your health.
  3. Schedule your annual preventive health check to assess your biopsychosocial health, which is vital for the well-being of your immune and inflammatory control system.
  4. Prevent adverse changes from accumulating within you and track your progressive healthy changes.
  5. Prevent overdependence on medicines and surgeries.
  6. Overcome ignorance and gain learnings on personal care amidst exposure to risks, harm and hazards.

8 Care service categories of Recoup Immune and Inflammation control services:

  • a.Complete entire person diagnosis evaluating multiple yet interrelated biopsychosocial functions.
  • b.Evaluating allergy reactions systematically and planning for reduced severity, incidence and long remission periods.
  • c.Profiling exposures, sensitivities and reactions from the past and predispositions for current and future health needs.
  • d.Profiling healthy functions using Health Scores, Lab panels (Basic), Metal toxin load and digital health screens like Body Composition Analyzer, Pulmonary function tests, and Medical Infrared Thermography.
  • e.Non-medicinal treatment as the first line of care, including exposure control, personal hygiene, nutrients and minerals in therapeutic doses, elimination diet and reintroduction protocol, systems detox, physical activities, IV nutrition, cessation of harmful substance use, circadian clock reset, breathworks and several options of non-invasive regenerative therapies. Personal preparation during travel to different locations, states, and countries.
  • f.Need-based recommendations for high-cost tests like Antibody studies, Microbiome studies, Epigenetic studies, Proteomics, bone density (DEXA) scans, colonoscopy/ endoscopy, and MRI to evaluate organ functions
  • g.Appropriate use and timely discontinuation of medicines with known side effects, using informed decisions based on personal health data, medical records and response to prior treatments (if any). Vaccine protocol for all ages, including elderly and travel-related needs.
  • h.Need-based referrals for pathologic diagnosis and treatment under haematologists.

Key objectives of the 4 interconnected phases of treatment and care plan:

Lasting Relief: Lasting recovery from allergic episodes, preventing recurrence, especially intensity and incidence of reaction, and tracking remission period, especially through sensitive seasons of the year. Neutralising hyperactive immune cells and uncontrolled inflammatory reactions in various body parts under medical care.

Root-cause medicine involves modifying daily routines until they are optimized to meet daily health needs, thereby protecting various organs from immune and inflammation-related harm, such as the gut, lungs, nose, eyes, blood vessels, nerves, brain regions, joints, skin, and lymph nodes, among others.

Rebalancing body functions: Strengthening each level of body defences, focussing on eliminating toxins and their metabolites out of the body, harmonising cross-influence between various bio-physiochemical systems, especially gut health, brain health, psychosocial well-being, bone marrow, hormones, and epigenetic modifications that mediate healthy immune sensing and inflammatory responses.

Building Immune resilience: Preserving healthy immune memory, capacities to sense allergens well and control inflammatory response despite recurring/constant exposure to antigens, risk, and harm using user-friendly care including health scores, exposure check, annual preventive health check, annual wellness physical examination, personal calendar of periodic detoxification massages, microbiome replenishment, IV nutrition/antioxidants, regenerative therapies including red light, ozone, hydrogen, peptides and several more.

Recoup Immune Health management team:

  • Functional Medicine Physicians
  • Lifestyle Medicine Physicians
  • Rehabilitation Physicians
  • Orthopedic Rheumatologist
  • Other Specialist Physicians
  • Ayurveda Physicians
  • Naturopathy and Yoga Physicians
  • Nutritionists
  • Clinical Psychologists
  • Physiotherapists
  • Occupational Therapists
  • Aquatic Therapists
  • Health coaches
  • Nurses
  • Other professionals, as required
  • Patient Care Coordinators
